privileged_info_summary: The clone_duplicate@1 task downloads a real image from Unsplash (photo-1416879595882-3373a0480b5b) showing gardening supplies and seedlings. The task requires GIMP's Clone tool to duplicate image elements with verification thresholds: ≥200 pixel coverage, ≥0.7 correlation similarity, ≥50 pixel spatial separation, and ≥75% pass score. Task configuration: 120-second timeout, 10 max steps, sparse rewards. All verification thresholds and task parameters are correctly implemented in verifier.py. NOTE: Image subject is gardening supplies/seedlings, not a 'garden with flowers' as described in setup script.
